I PURCHASED MY VEHICLE 11/3/19, TRADED IN MY 2016 MITSUBISHI FOR 2019 MITSUBISHI OUTLANDER. 3 DAYS LATER MY LIGHTS WENT OUT AND I TOOK THE CAR TO VICTORY MITSUBISHI DEALERSHIP IN THE BRONX AND THEY SAID IT WAS A LOOSE FUSE. THEY TIGHTED THE FUSE AND MY LIGHTS CAME ON.    ON 11/26

narrative.headline: What 2019 Mitsubishi Outlander owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 29 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (31% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
